component.name: Maré Player
component.summary: Maré Player — a COSMIC desktop applet for TIDAL music streaming

description.p: Stream TIDAL from your COSMIC panel. Hi-Res FLAC playback, library browsing, search, and full media-key control — all without leaving your desktop.

ul.li: Hi-Res audio — FLAC up to 24-bit/192 kHz via DASH
Library — playlists, albums, artists, favorites, mixes & track radio
Real-time spectrum visualizer
MPRIS integration — media keys, playerctl, KDE Connect
Secure OAuth login with system keyring storage
Local song & image caching with LRU eviction

screenshot.caption: Panel applet with library collection and now-playing bar
Standalone window showing album detail view

ul.li: Hi-Res audio streaming — FLAC up to 24-bit/192 kHz via DASH, decoded with symphonia
PulseAudio output (pipewire-pulse compatible)
Real-time FFT spectrum visualizer in the now-playing bar
MPRIS D-Bus integration — media keys, playerctl, KDE Connect
Library browsing — playlists, albums, artists, favorite tracks, mixes & radio
Search across TIDAL's catalog (tracks, albums, artists, playlists)
Track radio — start a radio station from any track
Favorites — add/remove tracks, albums; follow/unfollow artists
Shuffle playback for playlists, albums, mixes, and favorites
Sharing via song.link URLs
Secure OAuth device-code authentication with system keyring storage
Persistent sessions with automatic token refresh
Disk caching for songs and images with configurable size limits and LRU eviction
Audio quality selection — Low, High, Lossless, or Hi-Res (Master)
Runs as a panel applet or standalone window
